programme.desc: Ramsay descubre que el restaurante mexicano Mama Rita's sufre de una cocina desorganizada. Mientras tanto, la dueña puede tener que sacrificar una amistad para salvar su negocio.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay encuentra una segunda ubicación fallida de un restaurante familiar.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer was identified as the man who raped and strangled five young women in Virginia. With the use of DNA profiling, an innocent man is freed and the real killer is convicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, San Diego police are baffled by a pair of hands found in a dumpster. Through further investigation, they determine that the hands are those of missing person Don Hardin.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1980, Michigan resident Shannon Mohr died in what her new husband, David Davis, reported to be a horseback riding accident. After her death, Shannon's family reported that Davis seemed far from grief-stricken.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: After being admitted to the hospital with unexplained bleeding, 11-month-old Chad Shelton dies. Investigators and scientists frantically search for a cause when others from the same house fall ill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, police quickly arrested the most likely suspect. But cutting-edge technology from NASA enabled a forensic odontologist to prove the wrong man was behind bars.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los diez cocineros restantes deben hacer tapas con las sobras. Un error de un Chef hace que ambos equipos tengan un casi fracaso.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay desafía los paladares de los equipos en una prueba de sabor a ciegas. En un servicio de cena abarrotado, la ansiedad es mayor de lo normal cuando pasan las celebridades Eric McCormack y Robert Patrick.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El resto de los Chefs deberán preparar un plato a base de cangrejos y cada equipo presentará su plato más fuerte al Chef Ramsay. Durante el servicio de cena, los equipos crean sus propios menús.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay separa a los equipos. Ahora los seis Chefs restantes están solos, cada uno preparando un plato con catorce ingredientes simples.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de un viaje a Atlantic City Borgata, donde el ganador pronto será un gran Chef, los competidores deben preparar un plato original que se servirá en el aclamado hotel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay cocina para los cuatro Chefs restantes y luego les dice que repitan lo que han preparado. Posteriormente, se planea una propuesta de sorpresa para el menú de postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los tres finalistas preparen una comida para 100 de los mejores Chefs de Los Ángeles. El ganador aparece en un programa de televisión, mientras que los perdedores tienen que lavar y planchar la ropa de cama.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas deberán trabajar con un arquitecto para diseñar los espacios del restaurante para el desafío de la cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos concursantes se enfrentan en su última competencia de la cena final. El ganador asume el cargo de Chef en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del estreno de la temporada, dieciséis concursantes tienen la oportunidad de alcanzar el estrellato culinario y un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en la ciudad turística canadiense de Whistler, Columbia Británica.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del estreno de temporada, vuelve un competidor de la quinta temporada y los quince cocineros restantes se preparan para una cena marinera.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay despierta a los Chefs restantes en medio de la noche y les ordena que preparen una cena de espaguetis para los bomberos hambrientos. Los perdedores deben lavar y encerar los camiones de bomberos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los competidores deben crear perros calientes de proporciones perfectas para las celebridades Drew Lachey, John O'Hurley, Tom Green, Melinda Clarke, Christopher 'Kid' Reid y Kristy Swanson.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce Chefs restantes deberán planificar un saludo gastronómico por el regreso de un marine americano. El equipo perdedor tendrá que limpiar y decorar la fiesta de Tana Ramsay.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra attacks a G.I. Joe convoy and steals a high-powered experimental laser to complete their latest weapon... the weather dominator. When the Joes launch an air assault, Destro uses the device, and it's stormy skies ahead for the Joe team.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. The Joe team uses an energy mirror array to counter Cobra's Weather Dominator attack on Washington, D.C. When their defense is successful, the Weather Dominator explodes in orbit, scattering its vital components across the globe.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The painting "The First Supper" hides clues to an heirloom that Christ received from Virgin Mary. This painting has been kept by the clan of Judah for generations, and a woman named Nova knows where the painting is hidden.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Mona Lisa never leaves the Louvre Museum. Arsène Lupin tried unsuccessfully to steal her and Lupin III wants her for his collection, however, and fireworks ignite between him and Zenigata in charge of security.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Lupin is after is the Golden Treasure Ship at Mount Horai. It's said that the Seven Lucky Gods conferred this treasure, which is shown in public only once a year when the New Year's bell rings at the belfry of Kohoji Temple.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Lupin is tossed to and fro by Fujiko. But a man named Buckingham comes to him and sells him "disguise chewing gum" for 50,000 dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The island of Rabaul has many remains of Japanese casualties of the Pacific War. It's said that Captain Cook's secret treasure is hidden there, worth 1-billion pounds. Lupin and gang are after this treasure but they get attacked!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and gang break into the Bank of Stockholm but as usual, Fujiko tries to take the money all for herself. Lupin goes after her but she gets injured in an avalanche. She confesses to Lupin about the location of her most precious treasure…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends search a month for the pirate Kid's treasure, but they are thwarted by an underground organization called the Red Ghost. Knowing something is afoot, Lupin sends Fujiko and Goemon to investigate.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds a piece of paper in a silk hat, an heirloom of Arsène Lupin. It's information regarding an opal statue of Venus, and since Lupin figures its ownership is his birthright, he heads to Gregoire's castle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata acquires a pie-throwing gun, and is ordered to capture Lupin. Meanwhile, Lupin and Fujiko are discussing Napoleon's treasures. It's said that the key to solving the mystery of their whereabouts lies in a scarf made by Napoleon's assistant…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The young girl Francoise lives near Lupin; she watches Lupin and Fujiko talking, and falls for him. But her father scolds her and tells her to stay away from thieves, but Francoise devises a plan to approach Lupin anyway…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Professor Pancho has devoted his life to solving the problem of food supply. Lupin decides to help them out and invents a rocket that flies on corn fuel, thinking that maybe he and Fujiko will take a trip to the moon…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is blackmailed; Fujiko has been kidnapped, and for ransom he must steal a jeweled crown worth 100 million dollars. Lupin and friends head to the museum where their objective lies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lady Black and Fujiko have a bet. Whoever kills Lupin will get the loser's entire jewelry collection. Lady Black lures Lupin using Fujiko so she could kill him, but why is she so passionate about wanting him dead?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Boss Largo wants Lupin dead; Lupin had just stolen a bundle of the boss's casino profits. But no run of the mill hitman would suffice to wack Lupin. But Largo sees that Lupin is suffering from a toothache, and gets an idea.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin reads the morning paper, which says that Lupin stole a 100-karat diamond that was being used in a musical. He knows he didn't do it, so he asks Fujiko and others, but they too have no idea what it's all about.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The nation of Janaica is troubled with coup d'etats and revolutions, but Lupin, discovering that the president's mansion houses the missing painting "Nude Venus," decides to go scope the joint with Jigen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The master of surrealism, Monsieur Daré had spent three years working on his masterpiece, but news is out that the great object of art got stolen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Three incidents of bank robbery have happened; a total of 1.3 billion yen was stolen. A man calling himself Goemon is the culprit and he even sends Lupin a challenge, but Goemon wants to settle the score by himself.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's stash of Napoleon's cash got stolen, but Lupin catches the culprit and tries to make him confess. Turns out he's only one of the followers of the Fandar cult, and heads to their holy land of Fandara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin learns that a treasure trove lies in a volcano on Cleo Island, but it can only be reached when the mountain isn't spewing molten lava! He tries to convince Jigen and Goemon to join him but they're not interested.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko informs Lupin that fine quality diamonds from South Africa are stored in a safe of a global syndicate and importer of diamonds. Lupin makes his way as a worker in the boiler room, and steals the loot of diamonds.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds out about the jewel "Poison Trio" of the Borges family and decides to steal it after Fujiko goads him. Galdan, the nephew of Lucricia greets Lupin, and tells him that elderly Lucricia had been arrested and must be broken out of jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes on a safe-cracking rampage and rakes in 10 million francs. He needs the money to purchase the world's only rare Gold Butterfly at an auction. But Lupin drops the 10 million francs while on the run…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin scopes a jewelry museum where the billion-dollar gem Cleopatra's Tear is displayed. But Lupin can't get to it because the display case is secured by high-voltage electricity.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: No thief has ever succeeded in stealing the secret gem of Pompeii's nunnery; it's guarded by venomous snakes. Even Arsene Lupin gave up on it, since he hates snakes. But Lupin takes on the challenge. Will Lupin succeed? And what kind of secret gem is it?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though the tycoon Steel had replaced all his bodily organs with artificial organs to live, he's told that he only has a week to live. There is only one way he could prolong his life, which is to receive a brain transplant and he wants Lupin's Brain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Famous gourmand and field mice scientist Salmon Whitney is also known as being the chairman of a Canadian diamond mining operation. Lupin is after his diamonds, which will go on auction in Paris.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 6/4/09: Giants' ageless lefty, Randy Johnson, 45, joins MLB's exclusive 300 win club by twirling six-innings of two-hit, one-run ball against the Nationals during the first game of a double-header, thus cementing his place in baseball history.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The final spot in the 2009 postseason would come down a 163rd game between the Twins and the Tigers at the Metrodome. A back-and-forth game saw both teams take leads late. In the end, the Twins walked it off in the 12th inning of an instant classic.

programme.title: Epic Moments
programme.desc: Yankees infielder Aaron Boone creates one of the most memorable moments in the rivalry between the Yankees and Red Sox in the 2003 ALCS.

programme.title: Epic Moments
programme.desc: The 1992 Pirates were one out away from advancing to the World Series when Braves catcher Francisco Cabrera stepped to the plate with the bases loaded and two outs in the ninth.

programme.title: Epic Moments
programme.desc: The 1993 NL West race is highlighted as the Atlanta Braves and San Francisco Giants battled for the division and a postseason berth.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/25/2009: Andy Pettitte pitches into the 7th inning for the win in Game 6 of the 2009 American League Championship Series to lead the Yankees to a 5-2 victory over the Angels.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 5/29/10: Roy Halladay puts together a masterful performance against the Marlins, facing 27 batters and retiring them all in the 20th perfect game in MLB history.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/12/2010: Cliff Lee puts together an impressive outing to pull off a complete game with 11 strikeouts in the Rangers' 5-1 win against the Rays in the 2010 American League Division Series.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family; Lori and Bobby worry that long-distance dating is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy; Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The boys struggle with whether to attend Liam's barn sleepover or Girl Jordan's awesome pool party; the kids worry that Leni is too weak and they try to teach her how to be more aggressive.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When termites infest the house, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others stay with Aunt Ruth; Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment, but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana springs into action when she learns her favorite fish are in jeopardy of losing their home to construction; when Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde, as Ace and Jack, take on the case.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn junior administrator job, but can't give up the perks that come along with it; when the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their baby-sitting club, but she quickly proves to be too aggressive; Ronnie Anne's grandparents decide to spy on her when she wants to go downtown.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Hoping to win a songwriting contest, Luna contemplates whether she should go with a song that's true to her sound or try to make something that the whole world will love.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The origin of the woman called Bishop; a look into Bishop's reasons to hate mutants, and the secret of the Mechazoids.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Torn between her work friends and her school friends, Leni tries to bring everyone together; when Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to the Royal Woods House of Terror, Lincoln and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears; Lola discovers that Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Faced with spending Thanksgiving apart, Lori and Bobby try to bring their crazy families together for the first time.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After discovering he has rituals, Lincoln worries he's predictable and vows to change things up; Lori develops the yips when she finds out that the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After a pun-filled trip to the grocery store with Luan and Lola, Dad worries Lola thinks he plays favorites; when Lynn's friend Margo is celebrated for a one-in-a million soccer goal, Lynn tries to be supportive.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lucy quits the writing club at school due to the by-the-book way Huggins runs the club, Mom takes over; Luna and Sam embark on a challenge taking place across Royal Woods and discover they have less in common than they thought.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luan tries out for the school play to get closer to her crush, Benny; when Clyde and schoolmate Zach begin bonding over a mutual interest in antiques, Lincoln quickly finds himself feeling like a third wheel.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The kids promise to help Dad with the grand opening of his new restaurant by coming up with promotions, but their lack of teamwork and crazy promos lead to an ultimate nightmare in the kitchen for Dad.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne makes friends with Sid, a girl whose family wants to rent the apartment upstairs; when it looks like another couple might get it first, the girls resort to sabotage to try and dissuade them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When a high utility bill threatens Hector and Rosa's annual trip, Ronnie Anne spearheads an effort to lower usage; desperate for their own space, Ronnie Anne and Sid find a hidden room and try to keep it from the other tenants.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Carl witnesses Ronnie Anne save a dog, he becomes obsessed with being just like his newfound hero; Ronnie Anne secretly starts watching her family's favorite telenovela after refusing to watch it with them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne discovers that each family member will perform at Hector's birthday, she turns to Sid for help; Ronnie Anne's attempts to bond with her cool older cousin Carlota lead to a prank war against the boy cousins.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Louds rent a boat for a relaxing day trip on the lake, but the family ends up marooned on a desert island; Lincoln and Clyde, as Ace and Jack, investigate when they discover a frozen food company is using Dad's recipes.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift; Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids are good, so she uses baby smarts to avert sibling disasters.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori takes a job as a waitress at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated; spurred on by a classmate's mocking about Charles, Lana decides to train him to compete in a local dog show.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After Walt's failed attempt at romance, Charles, Cliff and Geo try to find their pal a love connection; Lincoln and Clyde beg their parents to let them go to space cadets camp, but it's not as fun as they expected.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: En `SB-129', Calamardo accidentalmente se encuentra a sí mismo en el futuro, y para su sorpresa extraña a Bob Esponja, luego en `Karate Choppers', Bob Esponja y Sandy descubren el karate.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: En `Sleepy Time' Bob Esponja visita los sueños de sus amigos y vecinos. Mientras que en `Suds', Bob Esponja llega con una enfermedad que lo transforma en fabricante de burbujas.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo convence a Bob Esponja y Patricio de unirse a él en una búsqueda del tesoro. Bob Esponja se sube al autobús equivocado.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja deja a todo el mundo enojado con sus bromas del Día de los Inocentes; Bob Esponja tiene el reto de cocinar para el Rey Neptuno y decide participar en un concurso entre cocineros.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Patricio está encantado cuando recibe un premio, pero por desgracia, era para Bob Esponja; luego, Bob Esponja hace un nuevo amigo, una burbuja que le hace compañía, lo que hace que la gente piense que está loco.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja tiene que lidiar con unas peligrosas bombas-tartas piratas; luego, Plankton construye un falso Don Cangrejo para obtener la receta de Krabby Patty.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja inventa hamburguesas con colores; Sandy pone a Bob Esponja y a Patricio a cuidar de su oruga.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se pregunta si se puede ser grande y todavía besar a su abuela; Calamardo se muda de Fondo de Bikini.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja va a trabajar para Plankton; Bob Esponja crea un GarabatoEsponja, quien le juega bromas a todo el mundo, obligando a Bob Esponja a borrarlo.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mistie suspects that her boyfriend has been cheating, but she never expected with her best friend, Allison! Next Jose's 2 boyfriends didn't know that they've been sharing Jose. Finally, Antjuan hates that his girlfriend strips for a living.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chris claims that Brianna's very controlling and doesn't let him go out to do the things that make him happy. Then, Chad is here to propose to his girlfriend Star but before they book the caterer, Star has a little confession to make.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our guests today say they are about to open the floodgates on their world of lies. They say they are drowning in miserable relationships and they're here to save themselves. They want out of their relationships and their lovers are about to find out.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Katrina says that her emotional needs are not being met, so she started cheating with Michaell. Then John explains to his girlfriend that he has recently acquired a female "indentured servant.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The guests on today's show say they need to break free from their love triangles and fight for the one's they love.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bob wears diapers every day, even on dates. Bob points out that he does not "use" the diaper, but merely thinks it's sexy to wear it. Our camera crew spent a day with Bob to see how he functions all day wearing diapers and the occasional tutu.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: These guests say they are willing to betray family and friends in their quest to find a lover.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: TiTi made a big mistake when she hooked up with her cousin's man Damo. Then, Ryan and Kristy are engaged, but Ryan says he wants to stop their upcoming nuptials because he slept with Kristy's sister Kayla.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Wayne doesn't know his fiancee, Kristin, is sleeping with her cousin! Next Springer Cam is there when JB drops the bomb on both of his girlfriends and tells them he's been cheating. Later Vinnie is sleeping with his best friend's fiancee, Shannon.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: After their sex life hit the dumps, Andrew searched for satisfaction and found it with his girlfriends sister! Then Desi will do anything to keep Melissa from leaving her behind, but sleeping with her cousin was not something she planned on!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Donna, who weighs 600 pounds, is desperate to lose weight and confronts her blind husband and angry kids about whether or not they’re responsible for her health.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Jack is worried about his grandchildren because his daughter-in-law Carol has been negligent and hot-tempered. Then, Kendra explains why she suddenly put Corey’s baby up for adoption.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jamarkus says he fears that his twins are not his own; a teen and his mother insist that he is not the father of his ex-girlfriend's baby; Leroy says there is no way his daughter's mother's son is his.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: At seventeen, Dimitrius has already had three children and now four additional women claim to be pregnant with his baby. Then Ethel and her daughters need Steve's help to right their wrongs and get their family back on track.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En el episodio de hoy de MAURY, estos hombres dicen que saben que la prueba de paternidad demostrará lo que siempre han sabido: que no son padres de los hijos de las mujeres que los trajeron aquí. ¡Ellas van a demostrar que están equivocados!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Estas mujeres han venido con preguntas urgentes! Kendra quiere que su esposo Richard admita que es el padre de su hijo Y del hijo de su amante! ¡Jevon y su familia no creen que él sea el padre del hijo de Jazmine! ¡Solo MAURY tiene las respuestas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Grace, la madre de Eddie, no los va a dejar vivir con ella a menos que Kay Kay pueda demostrar que su hijo, Eddie, es el padre de su nieto. Después, Troy niega ser el padre de los cinco hijos de Vanessa.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: La furiosa mamá Patty quiere demostrar que el novio de su hija, Dale, un hombre que duplica la edad de su hija, ha sido infiel. ¿Entonces Bam fue infiel a Brianna en su propia cama?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Keisha sabe que Desmond es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero él la quiere fuera de su vida! Después, dos madres desesperadas se enfrentan al padre de sus tres hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kiki y su hermana Sad-e aseguran que el novio de Kiki, Tavon, es un infiel. ¿Qué dirán cuando aparezca en nuestra cámara oculta? Entonces, ¿los hijos de James y Nikkie son realmente suyos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿La esposa del pastor Terry lo engañó con 200 hombres diferentes? A continuación, Naomi quiere averiguar si su prometido, Jesse, es un infiel. ¿Qué revelarán los resultados en Maury hoy?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maurio dice que no es padre de 5 hijos. Cuando se revelen los cinco análisis, ¿se demostrará que tiene razón o será un perdedor? ¡La familia de Jon dice que él no es el padre del bebé de Courtney! ¿Los resultados de la prueba dirán lo contrario?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Toni y Quintin regresan para averiguar quién es el padre de su hijo. ¡Esta vez se preguntarán si Toni fue infiel! ¡Jenny tiene que saber si su hijo es de su esposo o de su amiga! Finalmente, ¿Vivian pondrá fin a la búsqueda de su hijo de 30 años?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: El propio hermano de Terrazina, Tyson, cree que Simon no es el padre. ¿Probará Tyson que ella fue infiel y que Simon no es el padre de su hija? Después, William tendrá un acalorado debate con dos mujeres sobre la paternidad de sus hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Michael dice que él y Britny no tuvieron relaciones sexuales lo suficiente como para que ella quedara embarazada. Shekeita y su hermana Natasha están aquí para demostrar que Kieary es el verdadero padre del bebé de Shekeita.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rachelle cree que su novio, Chris, puede estar siendo infiel con unas 50 mujeres, ¡incluyendo a su hermana! Entonces, Carrie se sorprendió al descubrir que su novio, Chris, mintió sobre su servicio militar.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kyle niega ser el padre del hijo de Citasia. Su mamá dice que él miente. Entonces, Josh tuvo cinco hijos. Dana dice que más vale que se prepare para el sexto porque ella dice que es el padre de su bebé.

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.desc: Buckaroo Banzai is a rock-star/brain-surgeon/comic-book-hero/samurai who along with his group, the Hong Kong Cavaliers, must stop evil creatures from the 8th dimension (all named John) who are trying to conquer our dimension.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: Night of the Comet
programme.desc: A huge comet passes near the earth, vaporizing nearly the whole planet. But a few partially exposed people are now blood-thirsty zombies, and they begin a hunt for the remaining humans.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: Winona Ryder, Christian Slater, and Shannen Doherty star in this cruelly hilarious dark comedy, which became one of the biggest cult classics of the `80s.

programme.title: Valley Girl
programme.desc: When Valley Girl Julie (Deborah Foreman) dumps her preppy boyfriend, she unexpectedly finds love with rocker Randy (Nicolas Cage)...much to the dismay of her valley girlfriends who find Julie's punk hunk to be "grody to the max!" Fer Shure.

programme.title: Evolution
programme.desc: A firefighting cadet, two college professors, and a geeky-but-sexy government scientist work against an alien organism that has been rapidly evolving ever since its arrival on Earth inside a meteor.

programme.title: Bio-Dome
programme.desc: In this outrageous Comedy, five brave scientists are forced to face life forms more perplexing, more terrifying, more annoying than anything they've ever encountered: Pauly Shore and Stephen Baldwin.

programme.title: Jimi: All Is By My Side
programme.desc: A drama based on Jimi Hendrix's life as he left New York City for London, where his career took off.

programme.title: This Beautiful Fantastic
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of a beautiful London garden, this contemporary fairy tale centers on the unlikely friendship between a reclusive young woman who dreams of writing children’s books and a cranky widower.

programme.title: Brian's Song
programme.desc: Based on the real-life relationship between teammates Brian Piccolo and Gale Sayers and the bond established when Piccolo discovers that he is dying.

programme.title: Capote
programme.desc: In 1959, Truman Capote learns about the horrific and senseless murder of a family of four in Kansas. As he digs deeper into the story, he is inspired to expand the project into what would be his greatest work, In Cold Blood.

programme.title: Selma
programme.desc: From the Oscar-winning producers of 12 Years a Slave comes a powerful true story starring David Oyelewo and Oprah Winfrey. Facing violent opposition, Martin Luther King, Jr., led a historic march from Selma to Montgomery, changing the world forever.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: Will Smith puts on the gloves and steps between the ropes as 'Ali,' arguably the most fascinating personality in sports history, in this biopic from Academy Award nominated director Michael Mann.

programme.title: Bugsy
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer who dreamed of Hollywood stardom, a crazed patriot who plotted against Mussolini, and the brilliant visionary who carved Las Vegas out of the dry Nevada desert, Bugsy had it all. Rating: R

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: Blood and Chocolate
programme.desc: The story takes place in modern-day Bucharest and tells the tale of nineteen-year-old Vivian Gandillon, who has spent her life on the run from the truth that she is a werewolf.

programme.title: Skyline
programme.desc: Jarrod and Elaine travel to Los Angeles to meet his friend Terry and his wife Candice. Terry gives a party in his apartment for Jarrod. The next morning, the group is awakened by beams of light. The group of friends try to escape from the alien invaders.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Shark Boy & Lava Girl In 3-D
programme.desc: From Robert Rodriguez, the director of the SPY KIDS franchise comes another superhero adventure for the entire family. This is the extraordinary tale of a girl with the force of a volcano who teams up with a boy raised by Great White sharks.

programme.title: Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow
programme.desc: When mysterious giant robots begin attacking the streets of New York City, intrepid reporter Polly Perkins is on the story and enlists the aid of ace aviator and old flame Joseph 'Sky Captain' Sullivan.

programme.title: Stargate
programme.desc: When an ancient Egyptian artifact is discovered, two men unlock its secret power as a portal through time and space.

programme.title: WarGames

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Actress and James Beard Award-winning author and restaurateur Madhur Jaffrey shows audiences how to make Potatoes Marwari Style with Griddle Bread, while Ming prepares a Japanese Chicken Curry with Caramelized Onions and Cauliflower.

programme.title: Project Fire: Fish Hits the Fire
programme.desc: Learn how to grill fish with confidence. Steven demonstrates grilling Singapore-spiced halibut, whole fish with Indonesian spices, and Alaskan salmon with a smoky stuffing.

programme.title: Project Fire: The Pac-Rim Grill
programme.desc: Explore the flavors of the Pacific Rim with Vietnamese Jidori chicken skewers, Thai baby back ribs, and a summer salad with fire-roasted shrimp and pineapple.

programme.title: Project Fire: Cocktail Party
programme.desc: Host the ultimate barbecue cocktail party with grilled appetizers like jalapeño poppers, bacon-wrapped shrimp, and prosciutto-wrapped asparagus.

programme.title: Project Fire: Fusion 'Que
programme.desc: Fusion barbecue combines global flavors with traditional techniques. Try Korean short ribs, Japanese yakitori, and Brazilian churrasco.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: A restaurant in Ukraine where if you've ever hungered to hunker in a bunker, then this underground, military-themed restaurant will have you signing up on the spot.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: A restaurant in Tennessee where it's Christmas every day of the year at the 'Partridge & Pear'.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Puebla, Mexico - According to Tony, the best line cooks in NYC come from Mexico, so he travels to the Puebla, and enjoys mole sauces, toasted ant eggs, fried worms, and the legendary pulque (a slightly hallucinogenic drink made from cactus sap).

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Los Angeles - CA, New York chef, Anthony Bourdain, descends into the culinary underbelly of his metropolitan nemesis, Los Angeles, where he experiences the trials of celebrity fame and the joys of West Coast cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Napa, CA - Marooned in San Francisco, Tony tastes local shellfish and durian ice cream before embarking on a pilgrimage to experience the genius of Thomas Keller, chef, and owner of The French Laundry.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: New York, NY - Passionate about his city, Tony gives us an intimate tour of the New York City foods he loves - sturgeon and bagels, fluke ceviche, pan-seared foie gras, braised veal cheek, authentic cheese and, of course, a hotdog.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: New York, NY Provincetown, MA - Experience the formative moments of Tony's career as he revisits his first job, the culinary institute that taught him the basics, a normal workday at Les Halles Brasserie, and his mysterious mentor, Bigfoot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Scotland - Beginning in Glasgow, Tony experiences the heart-clogging glory of deep-fried pizza, deep-fried mars bars, and deep-fried pickled eggs! Moving on to more traditional fare, Tony tastes haggis and learns to hunt and fish for his food.

programme.title: Hidden Side of World War II

programme.title: World of Tanks and Commanders

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Despite severe rationing and around-the-clock security, the water reserves onboard the Destiny continue to drop. Dr. Nicholas Rush has no explanation for this latest setback but, if they are to survive, they must find a new water source soon.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When the SG-1 team inadvertently helps a desperate criminal, they are charged as accessories to murder and banished to a penal colony. Only one woman there has the power to help them escape....but freedom might not be worth the price she is asking!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Exploring a strange and beautiful garden in a distant world, the team members are trapped, knocked unconscious, and forced to relive their most haunting memories. Now, before they can find their way back home, they must find the way back to reality.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: O'Neill and the SG-1 team travel to the planet of Cimmeria to protect it from a massive Goa'uld attack, but they are quickly outnumbered and overpowered. Can they solve an ancient Cimmerian riddle in time to save the planet…and themselves?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 goes on a mission to rescue Teal'c's son, Rya'c, from the grasp of Apophis. But, when they finally reach Rya'c, he doesn't want to be saved -- he's been brainwashed and has accepted Apophis as his god! Can Teal'c find a way to win back his son?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Stargate project is imperiled when a reporter threatens to expose the top-secret portal. O'Neill attempts to stop him while the rest of the team tries to save Jackson's wife who has been impregnated with a Goa'uld. Is this the end of Stargate?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A giant insect has bitten Teal'c (Christopher Judge) and soon his body will transform into a cocoon and give birth to hundreds of insect aliens. Can the SG-1 team capture one of the bugs, extract the venom and save Teal'c before it's too late?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Following the jetliner crash just outside of Grandview,Melinda tries to get the confused ghost passengers to crossover,but she encounters an evil spirit who is working against her to keep the ghosts earthbound for "work" he has to do.

programme.desc: Coop and Dennis build a tree fort to get some Kat and little sister-free time. // Millie sells a record number of Greenie Girl Cookies but the boxes keep disappearing and all fingers point to Coop.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: After Kat learns X-Rays of him were taken on first trip to the Vet, he sneaks back to destroy them. // Coop’s new radio-controlled, rescue helicopter brings back memories for Dad of his favorite childhood toy.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop catches a nasty cold and has to stay home from school alone with Kat. // Coop and Dennis perform a magic show and make Kat disappear.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Kat’s new wind up mouse has a hypnotic effect on the other cats in the neighborhood. // Coop convinces Dad that he’s allergic to Kat so Dad will get rid of the pesky feline for good.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: When Coop and Kat get glued hand to paw they are forced to spend the day together. // Coop and Kat discover the prize for winning the neighborhood cat show is a year’s supply of Fishy Frisky Bits.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Thanks to the school bully, Pac-Man accidentally opens the portal to the Netherworld, unleashing an army of ghosts. Lucky for Pac-World, young Pac has the ability to eat the ghosts and burp out their eyeballs!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is under siege by ghosts and there is little Pac-Man can do about it without fresh berries from the Tree Of Life, which is hidden somewhere in the Netherworld and guarded not only by legions of ghosts, but fierce monsters!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and friends keep defeating all his ghosts, Betrayus, with the help of the demented Dr. Buttocks, decides to clone an army of Netherworld monsters. Lucky for Pac, one little monster isn't really a monster at heart.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks amps up the stakes by inventing the Molecular Magnifier to create gigantic Monsters. Meanwhile, Pac adopts the little monster that saved his life, but he's in for more trouble than he bargained for.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus plans to render Pac powerless – by getting Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde to feed Pac so much he'll be too full to eat anything else... power berries or ghosts! But Pac isn't getting full, even when he's eating everything in both worlds!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: During a particularly dangerous encounter with Eggman, Tails is injured. When auditions are held for a new sidekick, Eggman applies for the job. / While his evil lair is undergoing repairs, Dr. Eggman crashes on Tails' couch.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Sticks is invited to a fancy gala she admits that she doesn't know how to behave in polite society. / Sonic and friends join a traveling circus as a favor to the ringmaster.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Amy realizes that Sticks is a pack rat, she forces her friend to have a garage sale to get rid of all the junk. / Knuckles feels that the only reason Sonic always bests him is that Sonic has better luck.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: In an ancient temple, Sonic and Eggman find themselves trapped and must work together as friends to find a way out./ A super cool shrew comes to town and threatens Sonic's status as the town's biggest hero.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Tails builds a translation robot that inadvertently reveals the subtext of what everyone is saying. This leads to disagreements and fighting among Sonic and friends. / Sticks adopts a disgusting pet that annoys the rest of the gang.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Eggman turns Amy, Sticks, Tails, and Knuckles into evil clones of himself. / Sonic and Tails save a village that's being plundered by bandits — and then find that they can't leave because the villagers guilt trips them into staying.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Heloise posts an embarrassing video of Lucius on 'Spew Tube', it's up to Jimmy to restore the evil leader's bad reputation. --- Heloise breaks out the body swapper to get some sweet revenge after Beezy and Cerbee crash her picnic with Jimmy.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Lucius jacks up the heat into record-breaking levels, Jimmy infuriates him by throwing a beach party. --- When Lucius bans the use of cell phones in Miseryville, Jimmy turns to Dr. Scientist to help cure Beezy‘s mobile-mania.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Heloise’s supposedly miserable new invention turns out to be a carnival. --- In order to score tickets to see ‘Runny and the Nosebleeds’, Beezy and Jimmy get jobs babysitting the Molotov’s bratty kids.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy starts beating Lucius at Golf, Samy and Heloise must intervene before Lucius floods the whole town. --- Jimmy plays matchmaker to find Beezy a date to Lucius' statue-unveiling ceremony.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: An overconfident Jimmy steps into the ring to replace injured professional wrestler ‘Goat Boy’. --- When Jimmy uses Lucius’ private privy, an outraged Lucy destroys every washroom in Miseryville.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade is caught between her mom and Sean, but a drug test could reveal the truth. After Ali has a bad fall, Leah is forced to balance her growing concerns and support her sister during childbirth. Kailyn has a shocking revelation about Javi.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Tensions erupt when Jade asks her parents to move out. After an x-ray, Leah grapples with the possibility that Ali's condition is progressing. Briana and family move into their new house just in time for a Thanksgiving blowup.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail celebrates Isaac's birthday while life-changing news weighs on her. Leah reveals secrets about her past. Briana gives Devoin an opportunity to step up. Chelsea tries to change Aubree's visitation agreement with Adam's parents.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: The new coronavirus threatens Leah's travel plans and brings up serious concerns for Ali's health. Briana holds a summit with Devoin and Luis to insist they take on financial responsibility. Kailyn opens up about her pregnancy.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: The threat of coronavirus intensifies as Chelsea travels to Los Angeles for work. Leah and the girls go into self-quarantine to protect Ali. Briana has a new, secret fling with the potential for major heartbreak.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: When coronavirus makes it unsafe for crews to film, the moms pick up the cameras to self-shoot. Despite quarantine, Leah's book release pushes her and Jeremy to confront their past. Jade is forced to close her salon during lockdown.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: As the country emerges from quarantine, Briana struggles with the decision to send Nova back to school. Chelsea and Cole try for another baby. Kail and Jo struggle with the decision to let Isaac have more say, and Leah's family has a COVID-19 scare.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail gives birth to her 4th child. Chelsea worries about her health amid Cole's COVID-19 scare. Briana and Devoin get into a fight about finances. Leah's world is flipped upside down with all 3 kids at home. Jade calls Sean out for being unmotivated.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Tensions erupt between Jade & Sean at Kloie's birthday dinner. Leah attempts virtual learning with all three girls. Kailyn navigates a medical issue with Creed. Briana tries to put aside her anger with Devoin for Nova's birthday.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade's frustrations force her to break up with Sean. Kailyn tries to co-parent through the stress of virtual learning. Chelsea gets busier as COVID-19 numbers spike in South Dakota. Leah clears the air with Corey about her struggles with addiction.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah steps in when tensions between the twins boil over. Kailyn is forced to navigate the fallout of strong statements she made about Javi. Jade attempts to rebuild a positive co-parenting relationship with Sean.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea makes a difficult decision about her future. Leah withdraws Gracie from cheer in order to keep Ali safe. Kailyn tries to make amends. Jade deals with Sean's literal and figurative messes after he breaks her window. Briana cuts DeVoin.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: TM2's newest mom, Ashley, takes an anniversary trip with her boyfriend, Bar, who's got a big surprise. Leah receives life altering news about her health. After moving back to Dover, Kail says goodbye to her old house and bittersweet memories.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ashley gives Bar an answer, but past family drama may dampen their dream; a stressful move threatens to sour Jade's fresh start; Luis asks to see Stella for the first time in months.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Todos hablan de la boda de Juan y Norma, Belinda se convierte en la informante de Dínora, quien prepara un regalo muy explosivo. Gabriela confronta a Fernando sobre la venta de la hacienda.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad cree que sueña con Hugo, se siente muy perturbada por su rechazo. Úrsula corre en busca de ayuda cuando ella presenta malestares, el doctor Max sospecha que Hugo vive.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Lucas habla con Gladys, la madre de Arturo, para que liberen a Esther, pero ella establece una condición. Fabio y Beatriz se llevan una sorpresa cuando deciden cometer asaltos en el camino.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo se enfrenta a Fabio para proteger el secreto de su muerte, pero todo se complica. Mientras Boris ayuda al inspector a encontrar a los secuestradores de Esther, Arturo pretende matarla.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad trata de detener la manifestación de las personas que llegan a cobrar las deudas de Alcides. Beatriz se aprovecha del estado en que se encuentra para persuadir a Hugo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La Patrona no quiere que Lucho hable más del hombre que una vez amó. Alejandro recibe una invitación para conocer a Verónica Dantés, una poderosa mujer que despierta la curiosidad de todos. Francisca cree que es mejor seguir viviendo en su casa.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica Dantés llega en un helicóptero a la fiesta donde sus 12 enemigos la esperan. Su parecido con Gabriela asombra a todos. Antonia dice saber quién es la enigmática millonaria. Constanza llora al acercarse a su hijo. David y Max se pelean.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los Lobos están fascinados con Verónica, por su belleza, su poder y la posibilidad de hacer negocios juntos. David huye de la fiesta, asustado por el parecido de la señora Dantés con su madre. Alejandro recibe una oferta tentadora de la Patrona.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La noche tiene mucha seducción entre Verónica y Alejandro. David se presenta ante Verónica y le dice que le recuerda a su madre, a quién desprecia. Ella disimula cuánto le afecta el comentario. Antonia quiere matar poco a poco a la abuela de Valentina.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora tiene en la mira de un fusil a Sara y espera la orden de Rosario para disparar mientras Franco y Óscar organizan una fiesta para su sobrino Juan David. Mejora la relación de Ruth y Eva.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Tras salir del hospital, Fernando se apura a ejecutar su plan y ataca a Norma con la complicidad de sus mayordomos. Gabriela empieza a desconfiar al hallar a Malcolm y Carmela en su cuarto.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En defensa de Norma, Juan le da una paliza a Fernando y lo acorrala en su cuarto, Armando apunta a Reyes con un arma, pero Gabriela pone orden. Juan se lleva a su mujer y su hijo para su casa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Todos hablan de la boda de Juan y Norma, Belinda se convierte en la informante de Dínora, quien prepara un regalo muy explosivo. Gabriela confronta a Fernando sobre la venta de la hacienda.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad cree que sueña con Hugo, se siente muy perturbada por su rechazo. Úrsula corre en busca de ayuda cuando ella presenta malestares, el doctor Max sospecha que Hugo vive.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four Teams battle for the $1 million prize in a grueling two-hour season finale that starts in Japan, where Racers call upon their track skills for an exhausting Japanese game show, and concludes in Hawaii.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Double Your Money

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team makes a bold move, but it could cost them the game, while another Racer breaks down amid the frustration of a Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: There's No Crying In Baseball

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Funky Monkey

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Chill Out, Freak

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Get Your Sexy On

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race to Moscow, Russia, where they find themselves in deep water struggling to stay in sync during a challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: We Was Robbed

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Fishy Kiss

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four Teams arrive in Spain and travel to Rafael Nadal's practice courts for a volleying Roadblock. Also, one Team draws blood after getting bullish with a Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million dollar prize on the line, the final four teams race through France en route to the finish line in New York City, where they'll encounter a terrifying Houdini-inspired Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Business in the Front, Party in the Back

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives his son, Opie, a lecture on keeping promises, but must break one of his own in order to persuade a runaway kid to come home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie stage a hold-up at the drugstore so that Barney can impress Miss Rosemary with his heroics.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy makes a judgment concerning his son, Opie, before hearing the boy's side of the story.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to stop a long-time feud between 2 mountain families so their children can get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker sets the men and women of Mayberry against each other when she runs for a seat on the town council.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney give a Christmas party in the jail for a prisoner and his family, and thereby convert the town scrooge.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A stranger comes to Mayberry and disrupts the life of the townspeople because he knows everyone's name and business.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer descends on Mayberry and the town proceeds to make itself over in Hollywood's image.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy does some slick dealing to get rid of the town's worthless cannon, but when Opie mimics his father's shady deed, Andy has second thoughts.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In a rainforest outside Rio de Janeiro, Jack visits a breeding program that's slowly restoring the wild population of endangered Golden Lion Tamarins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Amazing Australia
